name: Survivalo
short_description: An exciting 3D game in which you, as an adventurer, explore mysterious mazes. Your task is to collect coins while avoiding dangerous monsters. But be careful!
detailed_description:
An exciting 3D game in which you, as an adventurer, explore mysterious mazes.
Your task is to collect coins while avoiding dangerous monsters. But be careful!
You will also need to search for bombs to destroy the monsters and unlock new levels. Ready for the adventure?
Features:
-Features: Mazes: The game offers a variety of mazes full of secrets. You'll have to explore every corner to find the exit.
-Coin collection: Your main goal is to collect coins that will help you unlock new levels or receive bonuses.
-Monsters and bombs: Beware of monsters that can attack you! But don't worry, you will also find bombs to help you destroy them.
